# OpenDDIL Regional Stack — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> OpenDDIL Regional Stack provides a Forward Operating Base for the Tiered
> Hub-and-Spoke architecture. Uses Redpanda Connect (open-source Benthos)
> to bridge events to HQ. 100% open-source, no enterprise licensing.

## CRITICAL: Restate Only at HQ
Restate does NOT run at the Regional level. This prevents split-brain processing.
Regional hubs are data proxies and event buffers only.

## Architecture
- Read Path: HQ Postgres → Logical Replication WHERE (region='EU') → Regional Postgres → ElectricSQL → Edge
- Write Path: Edge Relay → Regional Redpanda → Redpanda Connect → HQ Redpanda → Restate
- Bridge: Redpanda Connect (kafka_franz input→output) with DDIL backoff and Zstd compression
- Autonomous: Hub operates independently when disconnected; flushes backlog on reconnect

## Key Files
- docker-compose.yml: Regional Postgres, Redpanda, Console, ElectricSQL, Redpanda Connect.
- connect/redpanda-connect.yaml: kafka_franz bridge config with retry/backoff.
- replication/hq_to_regional.sql: Postgres logical replication with row filtering.

## Port Offsets
- Postgres: 5433, Redpanda: 19092, Console: 8081, ElectricSQL: 3001, Connect Health: 4195

## Why Redpanda Connect (not MirrorMaker 2)
- Apache 2.0 licensed (no enterprise features required)
- Single YAML config vs complex connector properties
- Built-in backpressure and DDIL-resilient retry
- Lightweight single binary (no JVM overhead)
